name: instrument_windows
description: Single source of truth for WHEN each instrument can be traded. Per-asset-class default window + per-symbol overrides. Read by shared/instrument_windows.py::can_trade_now() which gates every place_order call across all monitors. Scanning monitors keep running 24/7 (signals always emitted); only the order placement is gated.

us_equity.comment: NYSE/NASDAQ regular hours 09:30-16:00 ET → 13:30-20:00 UTC (winter) / 12:30-19:00 UTC (summer DST). Holiday list maintained in shared/market_hours.py::_HOLIDAYS_2026.

us_option.comment: Options trade same hours as underlying equity. Some options have shortened sessions on half-days — not modeled (use respect_us_holidays as conservative fallback).

crypto.comment: Alpaca crypto desk trades 24/7. BTC/USD, ETH/USD + Tier 2 alts (SOL, AVAX, etc.).

extended_hours_opt_in._comment: Symbols where we opt-in to Alpaca extended_hours=true on order. Empty by default. Add symbol → set true; alpaca_orders will pass extended_hours flag.

instrument_overrides._comment: Per-symbol override of enabled state. ALWAYS wins over default_windows. paused_until=null → manual re-enable only. paused_until=YYYY-MM-DD → auto-resume on that date.

MSTR.rationale: DISABLED 2026-05-08 — backtest 6mo: 2 trades / 0% WR / -$2,364. BTC-with-leverage; momentum-long breakouts get gap-down-killed.
MSTR.review_after: 2026-06-01 OR momentum-confirm filter ships + positive backtest

SMCI.rationale: DISABLED 2026-05-08 — backtest 6mo: 2 trades / 0% WR / -$2,109. High-beta AI single-name, hype-breakouts → earnings gap-down.

strategy_overrides._comment: Per-strategy disabled (orthogonal to per-symbol). Mirrors learning-loop/state.json::strategies for visibility. Source of truth for enable/disable still lives in state.json so learning-loop can flip it; this config is read-only mirror documented here.

overbought-short.rationale: DISABLED 2026-05-08 — backtest 6mo: 11% WR / -$2,065. Shorted into 8/9 trend-continuations during bull market. Needs market-regime gate.
overbought-short.review_after: Regime turn OR refactor with regime filter
